name: pi-understand
description: Bridges the Understand-Anything code-comprehension skill into pi. Builds a deterministic knowledge graph of the current project via bundled tree-sitter (WASM) workflow scripts, then answers questions and explains files against it. Tools: /understand (build/refresh the graph via the bundled SKILL.md workflow); /understand-explain <path> (explain a file/dir from the graph); /understand-chat <question> (ask about the codebase). Graph is saved under .understand-anything/. No native toolchain required — parsing uses web-tree-sitter WASM.
